title: tax — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channel for tax activity streams (rate updates, calculation completions); exemption-scoped channel for the verification queue live updates; provider-scoped channel for provider health widget + circuit-breaker state indicator. Reverb driver (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.tax
channels.description: Tenant-wide tax activity stream. Sink for the tax dashboard showing rate lifecycle + calculation activity.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Raw tax amounts (source_amount_cents / tax_amount_cents) broadcast to finance role + admin + owner, redacted for support role.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.tax.exemptions
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner OR compliance)
channels.notes: certificate_number + certificate_document_url NEVER broadcast (restricted per data-classes.json). Only the fact-of-change is broadcast; the SDUI re-fetches to get updated (redacted) exemption view.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.tax.providers
channels.description: Provider-scoped health + config activity. Powers the per-provider status chip + circuit-breaker state indicator in the tax dashboard.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND tenant_matches AND (finance role OR admin OR owner)
channels.notes: Provider config field NEVER broadcast (encrypted at rest; the channel does not decrypt). Every TaxProviderCircuitBreakerOpened fires a companion push notification via the notifications module (cannot-opt-out — tax pipeline degradation is a P1 finance signal).
